channel.title: The Prompt Index
channel.description: The living index of prompt-engineering collections, system prompts, optimizers and guides.

item.title: f/prompts.chat — momentum 87
item.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

item.title: JuliusBrussee/caveman — momentum 86
item.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

item.title: EvoLinkAI/awesome-gpt-image-2-API-and-Prompts — momentum 84
item.description: GPT-Image-2 API and Prompts

item.title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools — momentum 83
item.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts

item.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks — momentum 81
item.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Code, Claude Design, Opus 4.8, Sonnet 4.6. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex, Google - Gemini - 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity, xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

item.title: freestylefly/awesome-gpt-image-2 — momentum 81
item.description: Prompt as Code | GPT-Image2 工业级提示词引擎与模板库，470+ 个案例逆向工程，20+ 套工业级模板，并提炼出Skills，持续更新中

item.title: YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-gpt-image-2 — momentum 80
item.description: 🚀 World's largest GPT Image 2 prompt library, updated daily — 2000+ curated prompts with preview images, 16 languages. OpenAI's next-gen image model with pixel-perfect text rendering, cross-image consistency, and commercial-grade illustration. Free & open source.

item.title: linshenkx/prompt-optimizer — momentum 79
item.description: An AI prompt optimizer for writing better prompts and getting better AI results.

item.title: mlflow/mlflow — momentum 79
item.description: The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.

item.title: comet-ml/opik — momentum 77
item.description: Debug, evaluate, and monitor your LLM applications, RAG systems, and agentic workflows with comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards.

item.title: chopratejas/headroom — momentum 77
item.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

item.title: AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT — momentum 76
item.description: FinGPT: Open-Source Financial Large Language Models! Revolutionize 🔥 We release the trained model on HuggingFace.

item.title: YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-nano-banana-pro-prompts — momentum 75
item.description: 🍌 World's largest Nano Banana Pro prompt library — 10,000+ curated prompts with preview images, 16 languages. Google Gemini AI image generation. Free & open source.

item.title: langgptai/LangGPT — momentum 75
item.description: LangGPT: Empowering everyone to become a prompt expert! 🚀 📌 结构化提示词（Structured Prompt）提出者 📌 元提示词（Meta-Prompt）发起者 📌 最流行的提示词落地范式 | Language of GPT The pioneering framework for structured & meta-prompt design 10,000+ ⭐ | Battle-tested by thousands of users worldwide Created by 云中江树

item.title: EmbraceAGI/awesome-chatgpt-zh — momentum 75
item.description: ChatGPT 中文指南🔥，ChatGPT 中文调教指南，指令指南，应用开发指南，精选资源清单，更好的使用 chatGPT 让你的生产力 up up up! 🚀

item.title: microsoft/promptflow — momentum 74
item.description: Build high-quality LLM apps - from prototyping, testing to production deployment and monitoring.

item.title: Piebald-AI/claude-code-system-prompts — momentum 74
item.description: All parts of Claude Code's system prompt, 27 builtin tool descriptions, sub agent prompts (Plan/Explore/Task), utility prompts (CLAUDE.md, compact, statusline, magic docs, WebFetch, Bash cmd, security review, agent creation). Updated for each Claude Code version.

item.title: LouisShark/chatgpt_system_prompt — momentum 74
item.description: A collection of GPT system prompts and various prompt injection/leaking knowledge.

item.title: rockbenben/ChatGPT-Shortcut — momentum 73
item.description: 🚀💪Maximize your efficiency and productivity. The ultimate hub to manage, customize, and share prompts. (English/中文/Español/العربية). 让生产力加倍的 AI 快捷指令。更高效地管理提示词，在分享社区中发现适用于不同场景的灵感。

item.title: BoundaryML/baml — momentum 73
item.description: The AI framework that adds the engineering to prompt engineering (Python/TS/Ruby/Java/C#/Rust/Go compatible)

item.title: EvoMap/evolver — momentum 73
item.description: The GEP-powered self-evolving engine for AI agents. Auditable evolution with Genes, Capsules, and Events. | evomap.ai

item.title: ai-boost/awesome-prompts — momentum 73
item.description: Curated list of chatgpt prompts from the top-rated GPTs in the GPTs Store. Prompt Engineering, prompt attack & prompt protect. Advanced Prompt Engineering papers.

item.title: NirDiamant/Prompt_Engineering — momentum 73
item.description: 22 prompt engineering techniques with hands-on Jupyter Notebook tutorials, from fundamental concepts to advanced strategies for leveraging LLMs.

item.title: yaojingang/yao-open-prompts — momentum 73
item.description: Yao Open Prompts：中文 AI 提示词库，覆盖工作、学习、内容、营销和生活场景

item.title: dottxt-ai/outlines — momentum 72
item.description: Structured Outputs

item.title: ZeroLu/awesome-nanobanana-pro — momentum 72
item.description: 🚀 An awesome list of curated Nano Banana pro prompts and examples. Your go-to resource for mastering prompt engineering and exploring the creative potential of the Nano banana pro(Nano banana 2) AI image model.

item.title: kyegomez/swarms — momentum 72
item.description: The Enterprise-Grade Production-Ready Multi-Agent Orchestration Framework. Website: https://swarms.ai

item.title: Zipstack/unstract — momentum 72
item.description: LLM-Driven Extraction of Unstructured Data — Built for API Deployments & ETL Pipeline Workflows

item.title: promptslab/Awesome-Prompt-Engineering — momentum 72
item.description: This repository contains a hand-curated resources for Prompt Engineering with a focus on Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT), ChatGPT, PaLM etc

item.title: ZeroLu/awesome-gpt-image — momentum 72
item.description: A curated collection of the best GPT Image 2 prompts and examples. The prompts come from top creators on X.
